mapper.select:
select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, to_char(community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as community_date, view_count, member_thumb, member_grade, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count, (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl d where c.community_no = d.community_no) as dislike_count, (select count(*) from community_report_tbl r where c.community_no = r.community_no) as report_count, (select count(*) from community_comment_tbl cc where c.community_no = cc.community_no) as comment_count from community_tbl c join member_tbl on (community_writer = member_id) where community_status = 1
and ( community_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' or REGEXP_REPLACE(community_content, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' )
and community_writer = #{searchKeyword}
and member_grade=3
and member_grade in (1, 2)
order by community_no desc order by community_no asc order by view_count desc order by like_count desc order by dislike_count desc order by report_count desc offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select count(*) from community_tbl join member_tbl m on (community_writer = m.member_id) where community_status = 1
and ( community_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' or REGEXP_REPLACE(community_content, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' )
and community_writer = #{searchKeyword}
and member_grade=3
and member_grade in (1, 2)
mapper.insert: insert into community_tbl ( community_no, community_title, community_content, community_date, community_status, community_writer, view_count ) values ( community_seq.nextval, #{communityTitle}, #{communityContent}, sysdate, 1, #{communityWriter}, 0 )
mapper.select: select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, view_count, to_char(community_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as community_date from community_tbl join member_tbl on (community_writer = member_id) where community_no = #{communityNo}

select c.community_no, c.community_title, c.community_content, c.community_writer, to_char(c.community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as community_date, c.view_count, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count from community_tbl c join member_tbl m on (c.community_writer = m.member_id) where c.community_status = 1
order by like_count desc, c.community_no desc
and m.member_grade in (1, 2) order by c.community_no desc
offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only

select community_comment_no, community_comment_content, community_comment_date, community_no, community_comment_writer, community_comment_no2 from community_comment_tbl join member_tbl on(community_comment_writer = member_id) where community_no = #{communityNo} order by community_comment_no
select count(*) from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo}
select count(*) from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
delete from community_dislike_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
delete from community_report_tbl where community_no=#{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
